sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89059" key="prosempla/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεμ-πλάσσω</orth>, <sense id="n89059.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mix in</tr_> an ingredient <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">as well</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.67</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
